title: Ability to set a custom date/time for a update reminder!
excerpt: Please add a custom option to set the time/date of the update reminders!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add a custom option to set the time/date of the update reminders!

posts.author: DeanMD (Dean)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be veyr helpful we should be able to set a custom cadence for the reminder.

posts.author: AKBurczyk (Amanda Burczyk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I couldn’t agree more.
I need to follow up with a client in 2 months regarding a specific update. I would LOVE to do so IN Monday instead of a note on my regular calendar.

posts.author: Jykm25 (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature is totally necessary. can’t believe why monday team have not added this yet

posts.author: JMGoguen (Jean-Marc Goguen)
posts.cookedHtml: This one little feature would make a huge difference in my workflow.

posts.author: mmartin3 (Meagan)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see this feature! It’s a common feature in messaging platforms like Slack and would be so useful for purposeful reminders instead of constantly bumping until you’re available to review the update.

posts.author: PMJACK (Jack)
posts.cookedHtml: Please can this be prioritised? Simple feature which would be very useful!

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now you can, with the Time Based Automations & Reminders app!

With this app you can set up automations and reminders based on the specific time of any item in your board!

We’re constantly striving to improve and learn, so I’d really appreciate your feedback after using the app and any suggestions on how we can make the user experience even better!

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml: @PMJACK @mmartin3 @JMGoguen @Jykm25 @AKBurczyk @DeanMD @hlopezvc

posts.author: kristenjo (Kristen D.)
posts.cookedHtml: @Dana that looks like a great tool, but in my company, we don’t really have time for all that. Our turnaround times are 2-3 business days, we have about 400 items each, and I’m constantly having to reset the “Tomorrow” timer to keep on schedule. The tool you posted is more than just a couple of clicks every time and would be just as much time wasted. I found another app that’s slightly more efficient, but I think most of us just want to be able to click the reminder button on an item and have more than 5 choices.

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear @kristenjo , thank you so much for your feedback!
Will you be willing to hop on a short call with me so I can learn your use case better?
I really think we can offer the perfect solution with almost no clicks.
If you decide to work with us we’d be happy to offer you our app for free for the first year, to thank you for your cooperation.
This is a link to schedule a short call whenever it works for you:
https://calendar.app.google/HN8f8co11eKFAyAJ8
Thank you very much in advance!

posts.author: mwilson (Melissa Wilson )
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. The fact that we can’t set a custom reminder is a huge design oversight. And looking through requests, it has been asked for repeatedly.

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml:
so I just noticed this is now an option! YAY
i would love a thread where all the new releases are posted, I see there is one here What's New - monday.com Product Updates but this is new release isnt in there
